title: Villager Trades OP Guns.
description: Adds OP Guns with custom  villager trades for Minecraft.
body:
# Villager Trades OP Guns

Trade with villagers and get powerful custom guns.

# Required Mod

Required mod: [Timeless and Classics Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)

# Features

- OP custom trades
- Special gun items
- Easy to use
- Minecraft compatible datapack

# Extra Info

Best datapack for villagers and powerful gun trades.

# Installation

1. Put the datapack into your world's datapacks folder
2. Reload the world
3. Start trading
